---
title: "watchOS Client"
description-meta: "Install and use the openme Apple Watch companion app — knock directly from your wrist."
keywords: [openme watchOS, openme Apple Watch, knock watch, SPA watchOS]
---

The openme watchOS app is a companion to the iOS app. Once profiles are
configured on your iPhone, they sync to your Apple Watch so you can knock
straight from your wrist.

---

## Requirements {#requirements}

- Apple Watch (Series 4 or later recommended)
- iPhone with the [openme iOS app](ios.qmd) installed and profiles configured

---

## Install {#install}

The watchOS app is bundled with the iOS app.

1. Install [openme for iOS](ios.qmd).
2. On your iPhone, open the **Watch** app.
3. Scroll to **openme** under **Available Apps** and tap **Install**.

<!-- Screenshot placeholder: Watch app install screen -->
![Installing openme on Apple Watch](../images/placeholder-watch-install.png){.placeholder}

---

## Send a Knock {#knock}

1. Open **openme** on your Apple Watch.
2. Profiles synced from your iPhone are listed automatically.
3. Tap a profile to knock.

<!-- Screenshot placeholder: watchOS knock screen -->
![openme knock screen on Apple Watch](../images/placeholder-watch-knock.png){.placeholder}

::: {.callout-note}
Knocking requires the watch to have a network path — either via a paired iPhone
(standard) or directly on Apple Watch models with cellular.
:::
